description: Default production case pack for Phase 10. Run only 1-2 live cases at a time.

cases.topic: Suy nghi cua khach hang ve vay nhanh tien mat qua FE Credit
cases.focus: FE Credit vay nhanh tien mat
cases.audience: Tap trung vao feedback that ve trust, complaint, phi, va trai nghiem su dung FE Credit tai Viet Nam.
cases.comparison_policy: Ghi nhan so sanh neu giup ly giai trust hoac complaint, nhung uu tien feedback that ve FE Credit.
cases.expectation: Case nay dung de recheck answer closeout sau khi stop semantics va heartbeat da duoc sua.
success_signals: step heartbeat ro rang khi dang chay
answer_status dat terminal business state ro rang

cases.topic: Review co hinh anh ve mat na Ngu Hoa truoc va sau khi dung
cases.focus: feedback co hinh anh ve Ngu Hoa
cases.audience: Tap trung vao bai review co anh, screenshot, hoac bang chung truc quan lien quan den Ngu Hoa.
cases.comparison_policy: Ghi nhan so sanh neu no den tu review co anh hoac bang chung truc quan.
cases.expectation: Case nay dung de kiem tra heartbeat, timeout handling, va vision auditability tren mot use case image-bearing.
cases.vision_policy: Uu tien image-bearing evidence va ghi ro neu vision khong thay doi duoc decision.
success_signals: step-1 co heartbeat thay vi treo am tham
co image-bearing evidence hoac ly do ro rang vi sao khong co
artifact cuoi cung cho phep ket luan vision da duoc validate den muc nao

cases.topic: Phan hoi khach hang ve TPBank EVO
cases.audience: Tap trung vao khach hang dang dung hoac da trai nghiem TPBank EVO tai Viet Nam.
cases.comparison_policy: Van ghi nhan so sanh voi ngan hang khac, nhung uu tien feedback that ve TPBank EVO.
cases.expectation: Case nay dung de doi chieu answer closeout voi mot topic banking quen thuoc trong repo.
success_signals: run co failure taxonomy ro rang neu fail
co answer-ready hoac no-answer verdict co ly do
